song.title: I Have Been Chosen
song.presentation: C V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics: [C] .G C D I have been chosen. I am a child of God, .G C Am D A royal priesthood selected by the Lord . C D G To proclaim the excellence of Him who made me, . C D G And called me from |The darkness to the light. |(And God said…) [V1] .C D G D Em You are one body in My name. . C D G You are baptized one holy family. .C D G D Em Love every neighbor, and call them friend. . C D G Work together in peace and unity. (And I cried…) [V2] You did not choose Me, I chose you. Live apart from the ways of this world. Put your trust in Me to lead your life, And remember that My blood's enough for you. (And I cried…) [V3] Walk in a manner worthy of your call, And be zealous in all good deeds you do. Show your heart to shine before all men. Don't you worry, child, My voice will speak to you. (And I cried…)
